message:
fix: detect session folders by breadcrumb hierarchy instead of source field

Issue: Session folders created via UI have source="user_drive" not "session"
Backend sets source based on context, doesn't allow source="session" from API

Fix: Check if parent folder is "Kepler Sessions" using breadcrumbs
- Works for both backend-created (source="session") and UI-created folders
- Session folder structure: /Kepler Sessions/{conversation_id}/
- Pass conversation_id as sessionId when detected

files.patch:
@@ -1,27 +0,0 @@
-diff --git a/quickjs-libc.c b/quickjs-libc.c
-index a1b2c3d..e4f5678 100644
---- a/quickjs-libc.c
-+++ b/quickjs-libc.c
-@@ -56,6 +56,10 @@
- #include <errno.h>
- #include <fcntl.h>
-
-+#if defined(__wasi__)
-+#include <wasi/api.h>
-+#endif
-+
- #if !defined(_WIN32)
- #include <sys/ioctl.h>
- #include <poll.h>
-@@ -822,7 +826,12 @@ static JSValue js_std_exit(JSContext *ctx, JSValueConst this_val,
-     int status;
-     if (JS_ToInt32(ctx, &status, argv[0]))
-         status = -1;
-+#if defined(__wasi__)
-+    /* Use WASI proc_exit which can be trapped by the runtime */
-+    __wasi_proc_exit(status);
-+#else
-     exit(status);
-+#endif
-     return JS_UNDEFINED;
- }
